title: ctenitis fraterna
intro: Ctenitis fraterna, a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, is a type of plant native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The leaves of the Ctenitis fraterna plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
